nasb.text: “Take full vengeance for the sons of Israel on the Midianites; afterward you will be gathered to your people.”

esv.text: “Avenge the people of Israel on the Midianites. Afterward you shall be gathered to your people.”

cnv.text: “你要在米甸人身上報以色列人的仇，然後要歸到你本族那裡去。”

ccb.text: “你要为以色列人向米甸人报仇，之后你将归到祖先那里。”
